projects.title: Lab 01: VM, GitHub & Azure Setup
projects.description: Configured Azure VM hosting, GitHub repo workflow, and initial web server setup.

projects.title: Lab 02: HTML Resume
projects.description: Built a semantic HTML resume page with styling and a deliverable resume link.

projects.title: Lab 03b: AI-Assisted Web Development Enhancement
projects.description: Iteratively improved site design/structure using AI collaboration and documented iterations.

projects.title: Lab 04 Updated: RSS & Atom Feeds
projects.description: Created and validated RSS/Atom feeds, linked items to real pages, and deployed to Azure.

projects.title: Lab 05: JavaScript Form Validation
projects.description: Implemented client-side form validation and interaction with external JS and CSS.

projects.title: Lab 06: jQuery DOM Manipulation
projects.description: Used jQuery events and DOM updates to toggle UI, animate changes, and add items dynamically.

projects.title: Lab 08: JSON & AJAX Dynamic Projects Page
projects.description: Loads this JSON file with AJAX and builds the Projects menu dynamically with jQuery/jQueryUI.

projects.title: Lab 09: PHP & MySQL
projects.description: PHP + MySQL app with import/export and server-side functionality.

projects.title: Lab 10: Production Deployment, SSL & Auto-Deploy
projects.description: Production deployment, selective .htaccess security, HTTPS (Certbot), and GitHub webhook auto-deploy.
